summary: Set 030 Session 5 (final): in-extension lazy migration UX + activation-time loading state + AI-strategy quickpick + Marketplace + PyPI GA release + cross-provider audit. Shipped: tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/providers/scanState.ts (~70 LOC, idle->loading->ready phase manager publishing dabblerSessionSets.scanState context key), sessionSetsProvider.ts gains 'Setting up your project...' loading sentinel + needsMigrationBadge + needs-migration contextValue slug, tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/commands/migrateSet.ts (~330 LOC quickpick with regex/AI/generic; subprocesses `python -m ai_router.migrate_session_state --strategy <choice> --in-place --json`; opt-in modal cost confirmation for AI), tools/dabbler-ai-orchestration/src/utils/fileSystem.ts v2 detection setting needsMigration=true on schemaVersion missing/<3/v3-broken, extension.ts activation wiring (scanState.setLoading() before tree register; setImmediate(setReady) for ready flip; registerMigrateSetCommand factory), package.json gained migrate command + view/item/context menu gated on needs-migration contextValue + viewsWelcome `when: scanState == ready` gate to eliminate flash-of-CTA. AI strategy in ai_router/migrate_session_state.py (Option A per cross-provider audit 2026-05-17 with GPT-5.4 picking Python-side route() call with four refinements: structured failures, explicit opt-in, distinct invalid-AI vs invalid-input reasons, ugly-cases coverage): new ACTION_FAILED_AI_NO_CREDS/_PROVIDER_ERROR/_BAD_OUTPUT/_COUNT_MISMATCH codes, AiTitleResolutionError + 4 subclasses, _build_ai_title_prompt + _resolve_titles_via_ai helpers with deferred ai_router.route import, RouteResult JSON-dump-before-access invariant (per memory feedback_ai_router_route_result_handling), narrow no-creds classifier prioritizing transient/quota/timeout/5xx tokens before credential phrases, _migrate_state_dict gains titles_override parameter forcing use_generic_titles=False. Operator add-on: _probe_env_var_scopes + _augment_no_creds_reason use winreg on Windows to check User+Machine scopes before declaring no-creds — addresses the env-var-inheritance trap (var set after Python launched is invisible to os.getenv). 19 new pytest cases for AI strategy (10 from Round A scope + 7 from Round A fixes + 2 scope-probe + 1 Round B OSError routing) bringing migrator suite to 62 cases. Layer 3 Playwright smokes loading-state.spec.ts + migration-cta.spec.ts (7/7 green including 5 existing treeView smokes). downgradeStateFileToV2(h) + readStateFile(h) helpers added to electronLaunch.ts. Release: tag-driven CI workflows (.github/workflows/release.yml OIDC trusted publishing + .github/workflows/publish-vscode.yml with marketplace environment human-reviewer gate). Pivoted from spec's literal twine/vsce commands mid-session after operator caught the omission. Earlier session's silent twine upload landed PyPI 0.4.0 before the v0.4.0 tag's workflow ran; the workflow got the idempotent '400 File already exists' rejection (not a real failure). vsix-v0.14.0 tag's CI build failed on Linux due to over-eager lowercase import normalization that broke esbuild on case-sensitive FS; hotfixed to vsix-v0.14.1 with reverted casing — operator approved marketplace environment and 0.14.1 published in 1m0s. Verification: gpt-5-4 Round A $0.120 (REJECTED, 3 must-fix: classifier scope, ImportError class, snippet inclusion); Round B $0.158 (VERIFIED all 3 Round-A fixes + 1 new finding — OSError reading spec.md now routes to ACTION_SKIPPED_MALFORMED via explicit except OSError clause in migrate_one_set, applied as one-line fix per memory feedback_verifier_spiral_recruit_codex). Total Session 5 verification: $0.278. Tests: pytest 599 passed + 1 skipped + 8 e2e deselected (was 574+1 at Session 4 close, +25 new tests in Session 5). Mocha 376 passing + 2 pre-existing baseline failures (unchanged from Session 4). Layer 3 Playwright 7/7. tsc --noEmit clean. CLAUDE.md current-version line updated to v0.14.1.
